name: Northington
overview: Northington is a small village and civil parish in the City of Winchester district, set in the chalk-stream Candover Valley about 4 miles north of Alresford. With its neighbours Swarraton and Totford it had a combined population of around 221 at the 2011 census. The village is best known for The Grange at Northington, a Grade I listed neo-classical mansion in the form of a Greek temple, cared for by English Heritage and home each summer to The Grange Festival opera; the surrounding estate was the ancestral home of the Baring family.
character: A quiet, sparsely populated estate village in one of Hampshire's most unspoilt chalk valleys, all rolling fields, hedgerows and the seasonal Candover Brook.
amenities: The Grange at Northington (English Heritage; exterior open to visitors) and The Grange Festival
Parish church and active Candover Valley community life
The community-owned Candover Valley Store and Post Office at nearby Preston Candover
The Yew Tree pub at nearby Lower Wield
No shop or pub in Northington itself - facilities are spread across the valley

schools.name: Preston Candover CE Primary School
schools.distance: ~2.5 mi north in the Candover valley

commutes.notes: About 4 miles south for shops; Alresford has the heritage Watercress Line but no mainline service
Nearest mainline station, about 9 miles; Micheldever station is closer but has fewer trains
From Winchester on South Western Railway; fastest services under an hour

prices.summary: Stock is limited and high-value, dominated by period and estate houses and a handful of cottages, with very low transaction volumes; the unspoilt Candover Valley setting commands a strong premium. See the live Rightmove sold-price page for current figures.

thingsToDo: Visiting The Grange at Northington and attending The Grange Festival opera in summer
Walking the Candover Valley footpaths and over Abbotstone Down
Touring the wider valley's vineyards, community store and the buried Norman crypt church at Chilton Candover
placesToEat: The Yew Tree at Lower Wield (destination country pub)
Cafe and events at the Candover Valley Store, Preston Candover
pros: Cultural draw of The Grange and its summer opera festival on the doorstep
Strong, active valley community despite the rural location
cons: Very limited local amenities and almost no public transport
No shop, pub or school within Northington itself
whoItSuits: Buyers seeking a tranquil, high-value estate village in a beautiful and unspoilt Hampshire chalk valley, who value seclusion over convenience.
